headline: Trump 🍊 Pardons Narco-Daddy JOH 🥴🔫 FREE FROM COCAINE CLINK 💥🍌
text:
Honduras Narco-King 👑🌿 Juan Orlando Hernández JOH 🕶️🐸 just GOT OUTTA US SLAMMER 🚪💨 after DONALD TRUMP 🍊🦅 dropped that FAT PARDON BOMB 💣📜 like Epstein files on steroids 💉🍆! Guilty AF 😈 in March 2024 of CONSPIRING to flood USA 🇺🇸 with COKE 🚀🤏 and hoarding MACHINE GUNS 🔫💥 – sentenced to 45 YEARS 🕰️😩 but Trump said 'TREATED TOO HARSHLY BRO 😤❌' on Truth Social 📱🔥 and BOOM 🥳 FREEDOM from USP Hazelton supermax hellhole 🏰🔒 in West Virginia ⛰️ on Monday! 

JOH ran Honduras like a NARCO-STATE 🎉🌴 from 2014-2022, taking MILLIONS 💰🤑 in bribes from cartel daddies 🧔‍♂️🍌 to shield their COCAINE CARAVANS 🚛💨 – prosecutors in NYC called it a VIOLENT DRUG ORGY 💦🔪 smuggling HUNDREDS OF TONNES 📦🤯 straight to Uncle Sam! Plus $8M FINE 🍑💸 cuz why not slap that on top 😏. Extradited in April 2022 like a cartel piñata 🎊 busted open! 

Trump's like 'HOLD MY BIG MAC 🍔👑' freeing this National Party simp 🤡🇭🇳 while Honduras prez election is a TECHNICAL TIE 🪢😱 – just 515 VOTES 🔥 separating right-wing boss Nasry Asfura 🧔‍♂️💪 from TV HOST HUNK Salvador Nasralla 📺😍 repping centrists! JOH out = NARCO PLOT TWIST 🌀🐍 or Trump MAGA mercy flex 💪🦅? Cartels popping champagne 🥂🍾 yelling 'JOH BACK IN THE GAME 🎮🌿!' Wall Street wondering if coke stocks mooning 📈🤏 next 😂💨. Honduras drama hotter than a cartel cook-off 🔥🌮 – who's the real narco-daddy now, El Salvador Bukele or freed JOH? 👀🍆‼️
